title: Aurora's Allays
description: This pack adds a lot of different colored Allays
body:
This pack is provided to you by Aurora123
Credits for helping:
ShinyDragon96 with Nightmaroinne
Dan Stairman with the Aftons

welcome this is my latest pack "Aurora's Allays" that adds a ton of variation of the Allay my Favorite mob. Many people have Allays as their pet including me, because it doesn't have a good purpose so i thought if you want an allay as your pet then why not just add more of them that's the reason i have made this pack.Now you are thinking "why should I download this pack". My answer "why not" if the allay is "useless" and forgettable then why we just add some cool variation for people yo not regret for the voting. Anyways if you have any concerns, ideas,bugs,"not working with this pack",need leaks,talk with me,all that fun stuff join my discord
here:https://discord.gg/XK6rgmTNv3



Requires 0ptifine
